channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the core content structure and user-facing documentation pages using MDX. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Metadata Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages configuration and system-wide settings for the documentation engine. Architectural overview of the Metadata domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenAPI Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Maintains the formal API specification and endpoint definitions. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Security Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines authentication protocols and permissions for API access. Architectural overview of the Security domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Styling Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Customizes the visual presentation and branding of the documentation site. Architectural overview of the Styling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
